resources.string: Randomly change your ringtone after a phone call ends.
When enabled, the app will attempt to detect call ends and set a new ringtone.
Choose how the ringtone is selected when a call ends.
Required so Android can detect call state and allow changing the system ringtone.
Permissions — Phone: %1$s, Call log: %2$s, Write settings: %3$s
Missing requirements: call-end detection and ringtone changes will not run until all permissions are granted.
Note: On some Android versions, call-end detection may be delayed and depends on system restrictions.
